arts.ttl: Barcelona crowned LaLiga champions as Lamine Yamal nets stunner in win over Espanyol
arts.sum: Hansi Flick’s side wrap up title with two games to spare after derby victory

arts.ttl: Espanyol vs. Barcelona: Harrowing footage emerges of car ploughing into crowds leaving '13 injured'
arts.sum: Thirteen people have reportedly been left injured after a car ploughed through a crowd of people before Espanyol and Barcelona's La Liga clash.

arts.ttl: Watch: Espanyol attempted to stop Barcelona’s La Liga title celebrations on the club’s pitch

arts.ttl: Photo: Lamine Yamal recreated an iconic Lionel Messi moment during Espanyol clash
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Lamine Yamal was on Thursday responsible for recreating an iconic celebration on the part of club legend Lionel Messi. This of course comes fresh off the latest moment…

arts.ttl: Espanyol 0-2 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Lamine Yamal stunner helps Blaugrana secure the La Liga title
arts.sum: Barcelona secure the 2024-25 La Liga title with two games to spare courtesy of their 2-0 victory over Espanyol in the Catalan derby on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Espanyol fans injured as car hits crowd with Barcelona derby paused
arts.sum: No fans are believed to have sustained serious injuries

arts.ttl: Barcelona crowned LaLiga champions after Yamal stunner at Espanyol
arts.sum: Barcelona have been crowned champions of LaLiga after a Lamine Yamal-inspired 2-0 win at Espanyol
